title: The Conservation of Habitats and Species Regulations 2017 and The Conservation of Offshore Marine Habitats and Species Regulations 2017 PIR - RPC Opinion (Green-rated)
body: "The evidence presented provides a reasonable assessment of the effectiveness and continuing relevance of the Habitats Regulations. The analysis draws on a range of sources, including stakeholder feedback, government data, and published literature. While the regulations have partially met their objectives of protecting habitats and species, shortcomings are identified in implementation, interpretation inconsistencies, and achieving environmental outcomes.  The recommendation to amend the regulations to address these issues is well-supported. The PIR could be strengthened with better quantification of impacts.  The PIR is green-rated; fit for purpose. "
